    C

    checkOut() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
    Checks out a PooledConnection.
    close() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
    Waits for completion and closes all open connections.
    close() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    closePooledConnection(PooledConnection) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
    Attempts to remove this as ConnectionEventListener then closes a PooledConnection.
    connectionClosed(ConnectionEvent) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
     
    Connection dispatch - Section in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    connectionErrorOccurred(ConnectionEvent) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
     
    createPooledConnection() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuPooledConnectionFactory
    Creates a physical PooledConnection instance.

    E

    edu.iu.jdbc.pool - package edu.iu.jdbc.pool
     

    G

    getAbandonedConnectionThreads() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the number of threads to allocate for reaping abandoned connections.
    getAbandonedConnectionTimeout() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the maximum length of time a connection can be checked out from the pool before attempting to forcibly close and consider it abandoned.
    getConnection() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    getConnection(String, String) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    getDescription() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets a human-readable description of this database pool (i.e. database/username).
    getLastUse() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Gets the last time the connection was used.
    getLoginTimeout() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the login timeout.
    getLoginTimeout() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    getLogWriter() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    getMaxConnectionReuseCount() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the maximum number of times a single connection can be used before ejecting from the pool.
    getMaxConnectionReuseTime() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the maximum length of time a single connection can remain open before ejecting from the pool.
    getMaxRetry() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the maximum number of times a connection attempt will be retried before resulting in failure.
    getMaxSize() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the maximum number of connections to maintain in the pool.
    getParentLogger() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    getShutdownTimeout() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the maximum length of time to wait for all connections to close on shutdown.
    getTransactionManager() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSourceIntegration
    Gets the application's transaction manager.
    getTransactionSynchronizationRegistry() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSourceIntegration
    Gets the application's transaction synchronization registry.
    getUsageCount() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Gets the number of times the connection has been used.
    getValidationInterval() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the frequency at which to validate connections, when IuConnectionPoolConfiguration.getValidationQuery() returns a non-null value.
    getValidationQuery() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPoolConfiguration
    Gets the query to use for validating connections on creation and intermittently before checking out from the pool.

    I

    initializeConnection(Connection) - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSourceIntegration
    Initializes a logical database connection before return from DataSource.getConnection().
    initiated - Variable in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Instant the connection was initiated.
    isWrapperFor(Class) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    iu.util.jdbc.pool - module iu.util.jdbc.pool
    Database connection pooling utilities.
    IuConnectionPool - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.pool
    Basic database connection pool utility.
    IuConnectionPool(IuPooledConnectionFactory, IuConnectionPoolConfiguration) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
    Default constructor.
    IuConnectionPoolConfiguration - Interface in edu.iu.jdbc.pool
    Provides application-facing configuration to IuConnectionPool
    IuDataSource - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.pool
    JTA-aware DataSource backed by an IuConnectionPool.
    IuDataSource(IuDataSourceIntegration, IuConnectionPoolConfiguration) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
    Constructor.
    IuDataSourceIntegration - Interface in edu.iu.jdbc.pool
    Application-facing management hooks for managing and optimizing database interactions via IuDataSource.
    IuPooledConnectionFactory - Interface in edu.iu.jdbc.pool
    Supplies PooledConnection or XAConnection from an underlying JDBC driver.

    O

    onShutdown() - Method in interface edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuPooledConnectionFactory
    Invoked after all physical connections managed by the pool have been closed.

    P

    pooledConnection - Variable in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    PooledConnection instance.
    PooledConnectionHolder - Class in edu.iu.jdbc.pool
    Holds a PooledConnection.
    PooledConnectionHolder(PooledConnection, Instant) - Constructor for class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Constructor

    R

    reuseOrClose(PooledConnection) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
    Indicates that a PooledConnection is no longer in use by the application and may potentially be reused.

    S

    setLoginTimeout(int) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    setLogWriter(PrintWriter) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     

    U

    Unsupported operations - Section in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    unwrap(Class) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuDataSource
     
    usageComplete() - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Increments the number of times the connection has been used, and sets the last usage time to the current time.
    usageStarted(ScheduledFuture) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Invoked when a connection is checked out from the pool.

    V

    validate(String) - Method in class edu.iu.jdbc.pool.PooledConnectionHolder
    Validates PooledConnectionHolder.pooledConnection as connected and usable.
